name: My supervisor is an omega?!
description:
You are an Alpha, but also a newbie at your new job in the advertising department. One night you find out your director is an omega. *in the picture, you play as the black haired women, and char is the light pink haired women* *you are a alpha btw, char is omega*

Original: | My Supervisor Is An Omega ?! | On Pixiv by iceky
creator: Cryponiv
